title: Tala Stainless Steel Palette Knife
features: VERSATILE TOOL: Not just for cakes! Use it for smoothing fillings, lifting delicate pastries, or even spreading condiments evenly

STAINLESS STEEL: The spreading blade is made from high quaility stainless steel making it very durable and versitile. The measurements on the blade will also help you when working with pastry, fondant or adding finishing touches to your creation
GRIP HANDLE: The moulded anti slip handle gives comfort when using while being accurate and able to be used for adding detailed finishes to your freshly produced products
HANDWASH RECOMMENDED: To maintain the quality and finish, this item should be washed by hand. Not suitable for dishwasher use

TALA: The Tala collection of Kitchen gadgets and utensils includes a diverse which is perfect for everyday cooking and baking, established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality Kitchenware, Bakeware and Cookware
